title: Next Event Estimation (NEE)
description: Explains Next Event Estimation as the technique of explicitly connecting each path vertex to a sampled light source, dramatically reducing variance from direct illumination contributions that would otherwise require lucky light-source hits through pure BSDF sampling. NEE is a mandatory optimization in any practical path tracer and the interaction between NEE and MIS weights determines unbiasedness. Students will add NEE to a provided basic path tracer, verify MIS unbiasedness using a furnace test, and measure variance reduction on a scene with a small area light source.
